destinations.evidence: Both normal and inspector factory paths initialize a default async execution context under the async-context feature before building the EVM.

equivalence_argument: The feature-gated construction attaches AsyncCommitmentutionContext::default to the AsyncEthEvmContext in both creation paths, so async precompiles start with an initialized context.
rationale: The async-context cfg branches now create AsyncExecutionContext::default and attach it with with_async_context before the EVM is built. No candidate in this bounded assignment contradicts or removes it.
statement: When compiled with async-context, RitualEvmFactory must initialize AsyncEthEvmContext with a default AsyncExecutionContext for both normal and inspector EVM creation paths.
suggested_falsification_tests: Build with async-context, create normal and inspector EVMs, and assert their contexts expose an initialized async context before executing async precompiles.
summary: Async context is initialized by both RitualEvmFactory creation paths when enabled.
test_or_falsification_candidate: Build with async-context, create normal and inspector EVMs, and assert async_context() is available before any transaction executes.
title: Async context is initialized when enabled
